title: rothmannia engleriana var. ternifolia
intro: Rothmannia engleriana var. ternifolia, commonly known as the African forest tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rothmannia engleriana var. ternifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are typically used to make infusions or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
